user_feedback: ok no, can you move the UI informatoin back to the top, but move the plant seleciton UI to the bottom, and I want to use shift to switch between grid cursor and the plant selection, can you fix that
analysis:
- Issue identified: The user wants the HUD information (sun, score, wave) moved to the top of the screen, the plant selection menu to remain at the bottom, and the Shift key to be used to switch between grid cursor mode and menu mode (instead of Tab).
- Files affected: ui.js, input.js, index.html
- Changes needed:
  1. In ui.js: Move HUD rendering from bottom to top of screen
  2. In input.js: Change Shift key to toggle cursor mode (replacing Tab), remove cancel selection functionality from Shift
  3. In index.html: Update control descriptions to reflect Shift as mode switcher
